name: Xtra Innings
about: Xtra Innings is an indoor training facility in Urbandale, Iowa, offering batting cages, golf simulation, and sports lessons. The venue provides flexible memberships and cage rentals for athletes and golfers of all ages and skill levels. It is equipped with modern technology including HitTrax for baseball/softball analysis and a golf simulator called The Bunker.
why_golfers_like_it: On-site golf simulator for year-round practice
Flexible rental options and membership packages
Access to a variety of training technologies and challenges

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but as a golf simulator facility, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the most accurate experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any restrictions on outside food or drinks, but it does not explicitly allow them either.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes on the golf simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Xtra Innings is kid-friendly, offering lessons for youth under 18 and a family-oriented environment with multiple sports options.
